facts.text: Cavalli can accommodate up to 150 guests for both indoor and outdoor setups
Pricing starts at $15,000-$18,000 all-inclusive with tables, chairs, dinnerware, dance floor, and WiFi included
Cavalli works with preferred vendor list for catering. The venue provides prep and heating space only
Alcohol is allowed with a day-of permit. BYOB is not permitted
Amplified music must stop by 10pm. Hard venue close is 11pm
Fireworks are not permitted. Alternatives include LED displays and sparklers
Indoor ceremony backup is available in case of bad weather
